name: write-file
description: Write a file with automatic parent directory creation, supporting append mode, backup before edit, or read+transform a source file with sed, grep-v exclusion, and append-line for config file edits, replacing cat|sed|grep-v|echo chains.

parameters.name: --append
parameters.description: Append to file instead of overwriting

parameters.name: --backup
parameters.description: Create a .bak backup before overwriting an existing file

parameters.name: --read
parameters.description: Source file to read from instead of stdin/args

parameters.name: --sed
parameters.description: Sed expression to transform source file (e.g., s/old/new/g)

parameters.name: --grep-exclude
parameters.description: When --read is used, exclude lines matching this regex (replaces | grep -v chains)

parameters.name: --append-line
parameters.description: Append extra line after transformation (repeatable, collapses echo >> chains)

parameters.name: filepath
parameters.description: Path to the file to write

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: File content (as arguments or piped stdin)

examples.expected: Backup created then Written N bytes to /app/config/app.env

cost_saving_rationale: Combines mkdir -p, cp backup, cat/sed/grep-v write, and echo append into one step; --read --sed --grep-exclude --append-line collapses cp + sed -i + grep -v + echo >> chains into one step, saving 2-3 agent steps per config file edit.
